properties.name: Time stamp
properties.description: Can be set to the timestamp when the event when that triggered the notification took place.

properties.name: Actions
properties.description: Allows to give associated actions with the notification.

properties.name: Dismissible
properties.description: Wether or not the notification can be dismissed. If it can be dismissed the dismiss button is being shown.

properties.name: Description
properties.description: Sets the content of the description.

properties.name: Title
properties.description: Sets the content of the title.

properties.name: Inline
properties.description: Wether the title and description of the notification are being shown in one line. reduces the overall height of the notification allowing it to be used where space is at a premium.

properties.name: Border
properties.description: Wether the notification has a border or not. Borderless notifications are used for example in tables.

properties.name: Type
properties.description: What semantic type the notification is.

table.name: Actions
table.description: Allows you to provide actions the user can take based on the notification.

table.name: TImestamp
table.description: The timestamp gives an indication when the event that triggered the creation of the notification happened.

table.name: Timestamp & action section
table.description: If a timestamp or actions need to be shown as part of the notification then this section is shown. It contains the timestamp and actions.

table.name: Dismiss button
table.description: The dismiss button allows the user to dismiss the notification.

table.name: Content section
table.description: This is the main content section of the notification. It contains the Icon, title, description and dismiss button.

table.name: Description
table.description: A more in detail description of the message that is being conveyed to the user. This is supposed to give the user full context of what you are trying to tell them.

table.name: Title
table.description: The title of the notification is a short description of the message that is being conveyed to the user. Shouldn’t be too long.

table.name: Icon
table.description: The icon gives additional visual information what type of notification this is.
